ddls:
CREATE TABLE "video_platforms" (
  "plt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "plt_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the platform is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the platform was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the platform was last updated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for support or contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the video type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the video type is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the video type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the video type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "vid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "plt_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform where the video is hosted */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of video */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the video */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the video file in megabytes */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was uploaded */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the video is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the video was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the video was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_plt_id FOREIGN KEY ("plt_id") REFERENCES video_platforms ("plt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES video_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaming_data" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each streaming event */,
  "vid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being streamed */,
  "pkt_count_dl" REAL /* Packet count for the streaming event */,
  "frame_sum_dl" INTEGER /* Frame sum for the streaming event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the streaming event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device used for streaming */,
  "cdn_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the CDN used for streaming */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Bandwidth used during the streaming event in kbps */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency of the streaming event in milliseconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the streaming data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_data_cdn_id FOREIGN KEY ("cdn_id") REFERENCES cdns ("cdn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_data_vid_id FOREIGN KEY ("vid_id") REFERENCES videos ("vid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaming_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "vid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being evaluated */,
  "pkt_loss_rate" REAL /* Packet loss rate for the streaming event */,
  "frame_drop_rate" REAL /* Frame drop rate for the streaming event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Jitter of the streaming event in milliseconds */,
  "buffering_count" INTEGER /* Number of buffering events during the streaming event */,
  "buffering_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of buffering in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality metrics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_quality_metrics_vid_id FOREIGN KEY ("vid_id") REFERENCES videos ("vid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, developer) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the streaming data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streaming_data ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the device is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was last updated */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cdns" (
  "cdn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CDN */,
  "cdn_name" TEXT /* Name of the CDN */,
  "cdn_description" TEXT /* Description of the CDN */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the CDN is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CDN was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CDN was last updated */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the CDN */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cdn_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "vid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being evaluated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the video streaming quality (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment on the video streaming quality */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback has been resolved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was recorded */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who resolved the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_vid_id FOREIGN KEY ("vid_id") REFERENCES videos ("vid_id")
)
